linkedin_profile.headline: Managing Director @ The Goring | MBA, FIH, Master Innholder
linkedin_profile.about:
As a Managing Director at The Goring, one of the most iconic and privately owned 5* hotels in London, I lead a team of passionate professionals who deliver impeccable English service and food to our guests. With over 15 years of senior management experience in deluxe hotels, I have a proven track record in business acumen, guest experience, and employee engagement. I am an entrepreneurial leader in the luxury hospitality profession, with credentials such as Fellow of the Institute of Hospitality, Master Innholder, and Freedom of the City of London. I am passionate about the service industry and its potential to create memorable moments, loyal customers, and positive impact. My mission is to uphold the highest standards of quality, innovation, and sustainability in hospitality, and to inspire and empower the next generation of hoteliers.

Total Experience: 25 years and 10 months

linkedin_profile.headline: Guest Relations Manager at The Goring
linkedin_profile.about:
I am a passionate, meticulous and highly organised professional and dynamic Guest Services and Relations Manager with over 25 years’ expertise in front line 5-star luxury guest services in a diverse range of hotel, corporate and aviation settings. As an engaging leader, I build strong relationships at all levels and with clients alike. I provide outstanding attention to detail and I'm always prepared go the extra mile. I am results driven with sound commercial acumen and business focus with the ability to think outside the box I continuously deliver raising service standards to the next level. KEY SKILLS: ❖ Exemplary customer service ❖ Training and cross training ❖ Outstanding communication ❖ HR and legal perspective ❖ Marketing hotel and guest products ❖ Team management ❖ Financial and revenue aspects ❖ Multi lingual - English and Hindi ❖ Repeat business and services ❖ Follow up services

Total Experience: 32 years and 11 months

experience.title: Senior Flight Attendant
experience.description: In this diverse role, I supervised the overall performance of a team of Flight Attendants and managed the department goals for First/Business/Economy Class and Certificates for Outstanding Performance, as well as carrying out skillful negotiation and managed demanding situations using diplomacy at all times.

experience.title: Assistant Front Office Manager
experience.description: I started as Night Auditor in 2004, then progressed to Switchboard in 2005, and to Restaurant Hostess in 2006, Receptionist in 2006, Front Desk Supervisor in 2008, promoted to Assistant Front Office Manager in 2010. In the Assistant Front Office Manager role I supervised a team of 6 and liaised with Butlers and Housekeeping. I verified billing instructions, credit limit reports and handled guest complaints. I proudly won Employee of The Year 2009 Award, and nominated for The Receptionist of The Year 2007 by AICR UK.

experience.title: Opening Team
experience.description: As the Opening Team in this high profile role I implemented the pioneering "Host" concept in Hospitality Management and created Standard Operating Procedures. I oversaw the Floor Manager, Duty Manager, Personal Butler services, VIP amenities, guest relations, housekeeping and Concierge duty departments and managed room/suite reservations for rooms and restaurants covering all guest requests, reports and handovers.

experience.title: Guest Relations Executive Duty Manager
experience.description: One of the world’s most iconic luxury hotels: I established strong relationships with guests and ensured the highest level of hospitality and service was provided. Performed Duty Management responsibilities, managed associates, liaised with Butlers for all VIP guests and bespoke amenities and requirements and represented the hotel in guest or hotel related situations and built strong relationships with high profile VIP guests.

experience.title: Front Of House Supervisor
experience.description: Working for this corporate law firm I led two reception areas with 9 receptionists and all associated people management requirements and managed the expectations for all front of house including; global guests, events and clients.

experience.title: Elite Manager
experience.description: In this role I led the largest portfolio of 95 receptionists, 10 lunch cover receptionists and 3 Team Leaders and provided the best matched receptionists to 250 building receptions in the West End, City and Canary Wharf. I managed all aspects of people management, liaised closely with HR and Operations and created SOPs for Team Leaders to operate with consistency across their teams. I carried out multiple site visit, conducted spot checks on reception teams to ensure standards maintained.

experience.title: Client Services Manager
experience.description: Working for this leading independent provider of reception services in London, I coordinated high profile client portfolios for clients such as Land Securities, Apple, Derwent London, Grosvenor Estates, ‘The Gherkin’ 30 St Mary Axe (CBRE), 20 Gracechurch Street (BNP Paribas) and Dentsu Aegis Media. I managed direct staff of 2 Account Managers and 4 Team Leaders and indirect staff of 70 front of house receptionists. I developed, trained and monitored Account Manager and Team Leader performance and ensured training needs identified and met at all levels whilst maintaining KPI/SLA targets for each site and team compliance. I supported the HR function and developed knowledge of HR issues to be conversant across all aspects, alongside monitoring all Health and Safety procedural requirements. I spearheaded service initiatives across sites and delivered to clients and liaised with clients, attended client meetings to ensure client satisfaction and participated in new tenders, client presentations and pitches.

experience.title: Client Services Operations Manager
experience.description: A specialist provider of high quality, tailored guest services, I worked in this role based at MS offices in London and Glasgow and managed a team of 40 across 2 sites including receptionists, helpdesks, central reservations and switchboard. I developed all aspects of client service in line with the company’s vision and values and led from the front as an ambassador providing all front of house services to exceptional standards. I designed and changed standards for the front of house roles encapsulating hospitality aspects and provided regular team training on provision of upgraded services and creating the right impression and ensured comprehensive knowledge of all staff and clients to deliver efficient and time focused service. I oversaw the requirements of all staff, senior stakeholders, through to VIP guests, ensuring all needs were met whilst project managing all catering, business meeting, venue management across the offices.

experience.title: Guest Relations Manager
experience.description: Working for London's last remaining family-owned 5 star luxury hotel I lead the department to the highest standard, managing 3 footmen to deliver the ultimate 5-star luxury service to top end suites and liaising across all departments accordingly. I oversee VVIP clientele including heads of state, royalty, ambassadors and A-list Hollywood stars. I carry out training for the team to ensure quality and standards are maintained and an innovative vision is guaranteed. My key achievements in the role include the introduction of high profile cross training of footmen/butlers with Buckingham Palace and developed a close working relationship in order to develop a flawless service to the highest level of Royal Household standards and training of Buckingham Palace footmen/butlers to the Goring’s highest level of 5 star Forbes standards. I also streamlined the Guest Relations department into a fully functioning standalone department within the hotel and restructured the department to provide the highest level of service operating standards and procedures. I created bespoke personalised services offering a ‘customer service journey’ and VIP and enhanced services, which incorporated the introduction of handwritten cards for every client to provide bespoke and clear service requirements and the implementation of new service ideas in various areas, including guest amenities, improvements, and Duty Manager shifts.

linkedin_profile.headline: Deputy Director of Food and Beverage
linkedin_profile.about:
I am a very dedicated sommelier with excellent communication and client facing skills, developed through my experience as an assistant head sommelier within a prestigious 5-star Forbes hotel. Guest interaction and customer satisfaction are my priorities. I deliver outstanding customer service by bringing knowledge and enthusiasm. I am open-minded and hard-worker, keeping the work organised. Discovering new unusual wines fascinates me, thus I constantly improve my knowledge by travelling and taking part of different wine tasting in London.

Total Experience: 13 years
